case_title: CEAZAN, JOSH VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-06-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-15-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUMMARY OF CASE JOSUA CEAZAN & CCSF WAS FILED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO NON-APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $730.00 FILED BY CEAZAN, JOSH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REM: PLTF'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST REC'D IN COURT AND WILL BE RULED AT TRL.-PER COMM. KAPLAN.
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOV'T AGENCY.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE SETTLEMENT CHECK, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY 1/14/03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
PLTF CONTINUANCE REQUEST, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.
